# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

The `tests/vendor` directory records the pinned upstream oracle source used by parity tests.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Vendor directory index and task map | Finding vendored-oracle provenance quickly |
| `claude-code-usage-monitor.manifest.json` | Upstream source, pinned commit, and refresh metadata | Auditing oracle provenance or changing the pinned upstream bundle |
